name: change currency format

condition.statement:
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let test = "{{test}}"
return test != "preorder" && freeTrial != "yes" && checklogs != "upgrade"

steps.value:
let result = {{listPrices}}
return Intl.NumberFormat('{{locale}}', { style: 'currency', currency: '{{currency}}'}).format(result[6])
